title: Nursery Rhyme. XXX. Literal
content:
One, two, three,
        I love coffee,
        And Billy loves tea.
        How good you be,
        One, two, three.
        I love coffee,
        And Billy loves tea.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. XXX. Literal" is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
